---
title: "Chapter 3: Boundary Value Problems"
---

## Overview

This chapter addresses numerical solution techniques for boundary value problems in ordinary differential equations.

## Learning Objectives

- Formulate boundary value problems
- Apply shooting methods
- Implement finite difference methods
- Understand finite element basics

## Topics

### 3.1 Introduction to BVPs

### 3.2 Shooting Methods

### 3.3 Finite Difference Methods

### 3.4 Collocation Methods

### 3.5 Introduction to Finite Elements
